title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards Winners Summary
text: The 83rd Golden Globe Awards took place on January 11, 2026, with several films and shows dominating the night. One Battle After Another led the film categories, securing wins for Best Motion Picture Musical or Comedy, Best Director (Paul Thomas Anderson), Best Screenplay, and Best Supporting Female Actor. Hamnet claimed Best Motion Picture Drama under director Chloé Zhao's direction. The film also featured Jessie Buckley winning Best Female Actor in a Drama. Sinners earned recognition for Cinematic and Box Office Achievement and Best Original Score by Ludwig Göransson. The Studio dominated comedy television, winning Best TV Comedy Series and Best Male Actor in a TV Series Comedy for Seth Rogen. The Pitt took home Best TV Drama Series and Best Male Actor in a TV Series Drama. Adolescence secured four Golden Globe awards across multiple categories. Other notable winners include Best Animated Film KPop Demon Hunters, Best Non-English Language Film The Secret Agent, Best Stand-Up Comedy Ricky Gervais for Ricky Gervais: Mortality, and Best Podcast Good Hang With Amy Poehler.
